reasoning: XLK down -1.95% + XLE down -0.42% while XLF flat (+0.25%) = risk-off rotation with tech leading the selloff. Tech's 1.95% decline versus SPY's 1.21% indicates narrow, tech-driven weakness. Financials offer no support to offset tech drag. Premarket gap down -5.23 points and ribbon BEAR stack reinforce downside bias. However, XLF's resilience (not selling) prevents higher-confidence bearish call — partial breadth failure reduces conviction to medium.
key_observations: XLK -1.95%: tech weakness leading market lower, significant drag on SPY
XLF +0.25%: financials flat/neutral, no bullish support, no risk-on confirmation
XLE -0.42%: energy minor weakness, no sector leadership
Breadth: NARROW — tech selloff concentrated, not broad-based. SPY down 1.21% but XLK driving lower at -1.95%
Risk-off rotation confirmed: growth sectors weak, defensive neutral, no risk-on leadership
